svg.title: CloudMart traffic overview
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing traffic flow from browser through Istio gateway to frontend and backend services, with Istio control plane and observability stack alongside.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Istio ingress gateway do?')
sendPrompt('What does the frontend service do in CloudMart?')

svg.text: Istio service mesh (mTLS between all pods)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does product-svc do and how does canary work?')
sendPrompt('How does order-svc interact with payment and products?')
sendPrompt('What is user-svc used for in CloudMart?')
sendPrompt('How does the circuit breaker work on inventory-svc?')
sendPrompt('How does fault injection work on payment-svc?')
sendPrompt('What is the Istio control plane responsible for?')
sendPrompt('What does the Envoy sidecar proxy do in Istio?')
sendPrompt('What observability tools are used in CloudMart?')
sendPrompt('What do AuthorizationPolicy and PeerAuthentication do?')
sendPrompt('How does mTLS work in Istio STRICT mode?')
